top_signals.title: Op-Ed: what the Scope Systems cyber attack reveals about mining’s digital fragility
top_signals.summary: The recent ransomware attack targeting Scope Systems’ ERP software stack disrupted operations at dozens of mostly Australian mining companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Prinz Eugen ransomware prioritizes recent files for encryption
top_signals.summary: A new ransomware operation named 'Prinz Eugen' prioritizes recently modified files for encryption and leaves no ransom note on the system. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
